properties.avoid: All other CNS depressants. It is additionally recommended to be avoided if one has respiratory or liver issues as barbiturates are harsh on the liver.
properties.dose: Oral Light: 50-100mg Common: 100-200mg Heavy: 200-300mg | IM Light: 100-150mg Common: 150-200mg Heavy: 200mg+ | IV Light: 50-60mg Common: 60-100mg Heavy: 100mg+
properties.duration: Oral 3-4 hours | IM 3-4 hours | IV 15-20 minutes
properties.onset: Oral 15-60 minutes | IM 10-25 minutes | IV 1 minute
properties.summary: A CNS depressant drug that is of the barbituate class. The drug is not used often used medically due to it's high overdose potential in contrast to a lesser overdose risk with benzodiazepine. The drug is used for the treatment of insomnia

_general: Information on summary duration onset and dosage: Page 930 - Nurse's drug handbook 14th edition Jones and Bartlett 2015
